name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state, turn

(* State of each process: 1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"} *)
State == [p \in 1..N |-> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

(* Initial state: all idle, turn = 1 *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process p enters critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N :
                /\ state[p] = "trying"
                /\ turn = p
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          \/ (* Process p exits critical section *)
                /\ \E p \in 1..N :
                    /\ state[p] = "critical"
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          \/ (* Process p attempts to enter critical section *)
                /\ \E p \in 1..N :
                    /\ state[p] = "idle"
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          \/ (* Update turn to next process *)
                /\ turn' = IF turn = N THEN 1 ELSE turn + 1
                /\ state' = state

(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] \in {"idle", "trying", "critical"}
          /\ \A p, q \in 1..N : p /= q => state[p] # "critical" \/ state[q] # "critical"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means philosopher j holds fork i; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = -1 /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] /\ flag[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
    \/ /\ count < K
        /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)
    \/ /\ count > 0
        /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS State

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ State
        /\ state \in State

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
       /\ votedFor = None
       /\ state = Follower

Next == \/ (state = Follower /\ (votedFor' = None /\ state' = Follower))
      \/ (state = Candidate /\ (currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1 /\ votedFor' = self /\ state' = Candidate))
      \/ (state = Leader /\ (state' = Leader))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = 0

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = 0
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \notin readers'
              /\ writer_active' = 1
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = 1
              /\ writer_active' = 0
              /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in FiniteSubsets[1..N]
  /\ proposers \in FiniteSubsets[1..M]
  /\ chosen \in 1..N

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = <<[ballot = 0, value = 0] \in 1..N>>
  /\ proposers = <<[ballot = 0, value = 0] \in 1..M>>
  /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
  /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [ballot' = proposers[p].ballot, value' = proposers[p].value]

          acceptors[i]]
  /\ proposers[p].value' = 

          CHOOSE i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].value > 0

          proposers[p].value
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [ballot' = proposers[p].ballot, value' = proposers[p].value]

          acceptors[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ chosen' = proposers[p].value

Next == 
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : Prepare(p)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : Promise(p)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : Accept(p)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : Chosen(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MAX_RETRIES
VARIABLES sentChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount

Init ==
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ receivedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = 0

Next ==
    \/ /\ sentChunks # File
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {ChunkSize * Len(sentChunks) + 1 .. ChunkSize * Len(sentChunks) + ChunkSize}
          /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
          /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    \/ /\ sentChunks = File
       /\ receivedChunks # File
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
          /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks \cup {ChunkSize * Len(receivedChunks) + 1 .. ChunkSize * Len(receivedChunks) + ChunkSize}
          /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    \/ /\ sentChunks = File
       /\ receivedChunks # File
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
          /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
          /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sentChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon = 1

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + Sum([j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j]]) \div N)]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + 1)]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = {1, 2, ..., N}
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ client \in Clients
             /\ page \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {page}
             /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![client] = @ \cup {page}]
        \/ /\ client \in Clients
           /\ page \in allocated[client]
          /\ free' = free \cup {page}
             /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![client] = @ \ {page}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Message, Subscriber, Topic

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

(* TypeOK ensures all variables have correct types *)
TypeOK == 
    subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET Subscriber] /\
    messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]

(* Init sets up an empty broker *)
Init == 
    subscribers = [t \in Topic |-> {}] /\
    messages = [t \in Topic |-> <<>>]

(* Next describes how the broker updates state *)
Next == 
    \E t \in Topic : \E s \in Subscriber : \E m \in Message :
        /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {s}] /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], m)] /\ UNCHANGED <<s \in subscribers[t]>> \* unchanged for other subscribers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == \/ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          \/ \E n, m \in Node :
              /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

====
